/usr/bin/ar qc ../lib/libbinlogevents.a CMakeFiles/binlogevents_static.dir/binary_log_funcs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogevents_static.dir/binlog_event.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogevents_static.dir/buffer/grow_calculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogevents_static.dir/buffer/grow_constraint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogevents_static.dir/buffer/grow_status.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogevents_static.dir/codecs/binary.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogevents_static.dir/codecs/factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogevents_static.dir/compression/base.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogevents_static.dir/compression/compressor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogevents_static.dir/compression/decompressor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogevents_static.dir/compression/decompress_status.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogevents_static.dir/compression/factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogevents_static.dir/compression/payload_event_buffer_istream.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogevents_static.dir/compression/none_comp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogevents_static.dir/compression/none_dec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogevents_static.dir/compression/zstd_comp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogevents_static.dir/compression/zstd_dec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogevents_static.dir/control_events.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogevents_static.dir/event_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogevents_static.dir/gtids/gtid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogevents_static.dir/gtids/gtidset.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogevents_static.dir/load_data_events.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogevents_static.dir/rows_event.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogevents_static.dir/statement_events.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogevents_static.dir/trx_boundary_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/binlogevents_static.dir/uuid.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../lib/libbinlogevents.a
